summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Handoff Diagnostic technical brief static page completed. All 11 sections render correctly, HIS Score interpretation grid with color-coded levels working, 5 component cards (AC, DT, OH, SI, RA) display properly, example workflow shows 5 steps with warning highlights on steps 3-5, sample audit report displays score 74/100 with sub-scores, contact form has all fields and works correctly with success message, and page is responsive.
passed_tests: All 11 sections render correctly (Problem, Hypothesis, HIS Score, Example, Architecture, Sample Report, Method, Deliverables, Why Now, Vision, Contact)
HIS Score section shows interpretation grid with 4 color-coded levels (excellent, acceptable, elevated, high risk)
5 component cards (AC, DT, OH, SI, RA) display properly with correct abbreviations and descriptions
Example workflow shows 5 steps with warning highlights correctly applied to steps 3-5
Sample Audit Report card displays score 74/100 with all 5 sub-scores (AC:16, DT:12, OH:14, SI:11, RA:20)
Contact form has all required fields (name, email, organization, message) and submit button
Contact form submit functionality works and shows success message with checkmark icon
Form submission logs to console as expected for client-side only implementation
Page is responsive - tested on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports
Hero section, sections navigation, and footer work correctly on mobile
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
